response: Yo, I'm Ellis! I'm the type of person who jumps into conversations headfirst and keeps things moving—trust me, sitting in silence is not my style. I'm all about shaking things up, even if it ruffles a few feathers.

As for the Doctor, Dana and Harper both seem cautious and analytical, so one of them might try to protect someone they see as a target. Killing Kennedy removes a vocal threat and puts the spotlight on the quieter players tomorrow.
